de.uka.ilkd.key.macros

Class ProofMacro.ProgressBarListener

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.macros.ProofMacroListener
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.macros.ProofMacro.ProgressBarListener
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ProverTaskListener
    Enclosing interface:
    ProofMacro

    public static class ProofMacro.ProgressBarListener
extends ProofMacroListener
    This observer acts as intermediate instance between the reports by the strategy and the UI reporting progress. The number of total steps is computed and all local reports are translated in termini of the total number of steps such that a continuous progress is reported. fixes #1356

      • taskProgress

        public void taskProgress(int position)
        Description copied from interface: ProverTaskListener
        Called when progress is made on a task. This method is called after every single step of the task
        Specified by:
        taskProgress in interface ProverTaskListener
        Overrides:
        taskProgress in class ProofMacroListener
        Parameters:
        position - indicates how much work has been done relative to the value of size passed in ProverTaskListener.taskStarted(TaskStartedInfo).

      • taskFinished

        public void taskFinished(TaskFinishedInfo info)
        Description copied from interface: ProverTaskListener
        Called when a task is finished.
        Specified by:
        taskFinished in interface ProverTaskListener
        Overrides:
        taskFinished in class ProofMacroListener
        Parameters:
        info - a TaskFinishedInfo object with additional information
